AI Automation Ecosystem
  • Smart Automation Discovery API
  • View page source

Smart Automation Discovery API

Discovers automation opportunities

Key Features

  • Finds 8+ automation opportunities

  • Estimates $300K+/year value

  • Generates implementation plans

  • ROI analysis

Module Reference

🎯 SMART AUTOMATION DISCOVERY ENGINE

Uses ALL 12 AI APIs to intelligently discover automation opportunities across your entire system (~/, ~/pythons, projects)

Based on deep analysis: - 562,868 files (92.60 GB) - 63,804 Python files - 17,071 Markdown files - 24,900 JSON files - 35,581 images - 1,921 audio files

Discovers: - 🔄 Repetitive tasks that can be automated - 🔗 Integration opportunities between tools - ⚡ Performance optimization possibilities - 🤖 AI enhancement opportunities - 💡 Novel workflow combinations

class SMART_AUTOMATION_DISCOVERY.AutomationOpportunity(id: str, name: str, description: str, category: str, impact_score: float, complexity: str, time_saved_monthly: int, ai_models_suggested: ~typing.List[str], implementation_steps: ~typing.List[str], files_involved: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>, estimated_roi: str = '')[source]

Bases: object

An identified automation opportunity

id: str
name: str
description: str
category: str
impact_score: float
complexity: str
time_saved_monthly: int
ai_models_suggested: List[str]
implementation_steps: List[str]
files_involved: List[str]
estimated_roi: str = ''
__init__(id: str, name: str, description: str, category: str, impact_score: float, complexity: str, time_saved_monthly: int, ai_models_suggested: ~typing.List[str], implementation_steps: ~typing.List[str], files_involved: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>, estimated_roi: str = '') → None
class SMART_AUTOMATION_DISCOVERY.SmartAutomationDiscovery(home_dir: str = '/Users/steven')[source]

Bases: object

Discovers automation opportunities using AI analysis

__init__(home_dir: str = '/Users/steven')[source]
analyze_home_directory() → Dict[source]

Analyze home directory structure and file distribution

analyze_pythons_directory() → Dict[source]

Analyze pythons directory for patterns

discover_content_pipelines() → List[AutomationOpportunity][source]

Discover content creation pipelines that can be automated

prioritize_opportunities() → List[AutomationOpportunity][source]

Prioritize opportunities using AI analysis

generate_implementation_plan(opportunity: AutomationOpportunity) → str[source]

Generate detailed implementation plan using Claude

generate_report() → str[source]

Generate comprehensive automation discovery report

save_implementation_plans(output_dir: str = 'automation_plans')[source]

Generate and save implementation plans for all opportunities

SMART_AUTOMATION_DISCOVERY.main()[source]

Main execution
